measurement_note: Size is r, the Transactions row count. One account has half of its unit deposits in January and half in February, so both consecutive monthly totals strictly exceed max_income. Grouping by account-month and joining the two qualified periods takes O(r log r) general-case time. A correct slower query that recomputes each transaction's monthly total with correlated scans processes O(r^2) row pairs, completes all tiers, and fails only by scaling.

cases.name: benchmark: 64 deposits split across two consecutive months
benchmark: 256 deposits split across two consecutive months
benchmark: 512 deposits split across two consecutive months
